Careers

Looking for an organization that values integrity and effort, and that provides a professional environment that promotes development through mentoring? RECL has a team of dedicated professionals, many of whom have been with the organization since they entered the workforce. They are among the best in their fields and they are the reason for our success.

Ron Eastern Construction Ltd. (“RECL”) is a leading Canadian Construction Manager, Design-Builder, and General Contractor, based in Ottawa. Since its inception in 1958, RECL and its associate companies have been involved in a diverse range of difficult and high-profile projects. These projects include institutional, residential, heavy engineering, commercial, and industrial projects.  

RECL takes pride in fostering a collaborative work environment, with continuous learning and growth opportunities. Mentoring and teaching, a flexible work environment and work/life balance are fundamental in our culture. We want team members to feel trusted, be invested, and enjoy their work.

Please submit your resume with references to: careers@recl.ca
